templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: A standardized mutual non-disclosure agreement created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Offered as a free, modifiable legal template.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: The cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to specify the business-specific terms when executing the agreement.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: A standardized legal contract created by a diverse committee of attorneys that allows parties to establish cloud service relationships by completing a cover page and order forms incorporating the standard terms.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: A freely-available service level agreement template created by a committee of legal professionals. Designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: A standardized legal document created by a committee of over 40 attorneys for governing how data is processed between parties. Available as a free, modifiable template under the CC BY 4.0 license.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: A standardized contract template developed collaboratively by over 40 attorneys representing various sectors of the technology and legal industries. Provides a reusable framework for design partnership engagements.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: A standardized contract template created collaboratively by technology vendors, law firms, and procurement professionals. Provides a reusable framework for defining service engagements.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: A standardized legal template created collaboratively by over 40 attorneys to facilitate partnerships between technology vendors and other parties. Provides customizable business and legal terms.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: A Business Associate Agreement (BAA) template developed collaboratively by over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Used to govern HIPAA-compliant data handling relationships.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: A standardized contract template created by a diverse committee of attorneys to facilitate software licensing transactions. Provides a reusable legal framework that parties can customize with their specific business terms.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: A short-term contract that allows a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a longer-term deal. Enables both parties to reduce risk and gather information prior to entering a comprehensive commercial relationship.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: A standardized legal framework created by a diverse committee of attorneys to facilitate agreements involving artificial intelligence services. Provides a flexible, freely-available template that can be customized for specific AI-related business and legal requirements.
